Picture size must be larger than display size. 3D box frame is made of waterproof MDF material, and safe shatterproof tempered Glass could be better protect against scratches.

【Hang on the Wall & Place on the Table】Box frames for crafts 3D deep can be displayed on your wall, mantel or tabletop. You can place the box frame anywhere you want to display it, easily creating a warm and lovely home atmosphere for you and your family.

【Show Your Creativity】Ideal for storing your unforgettable things (such as dried flowers, pictures, baby shoes, dummies, travel tickets, etc.); You can place keepsakes, pictures, small gifts or decorative things freely in the shadow box frame, open your mind to create your unique piece of art.

【Ideal Gift】Deep picture frames box display 8x10 inch set is very suitable as a gift for family and friends for weddings, birthdays, anniversaries, Mother's Day and other holidays. Ideal for any place in a room, living room, baby room or office.

【Intact Packaging】You don't have to worry about receiving a damaged 3D shadow box frame as we send it in multiple layers of good protective packaging. If you have received a defective item, we provide reture for a refund or replacement timely.
